title: Shefa 10oz, 50 Paper Cups - Heat-Resistant, BPA-Free Coffee Cups for Hot and Cold Drinks - Takeaway for Coffee Shops
features: Big Value Pack to Help You Save: Get more value for your money with our pack of small coffee cups! Includes 50 pieces of 8oz paper cup that you can use for a cafe, mobile coffee business, or party.

Sturdy Paper Cups for Your Favourite Drink: Made from durable material, our recyclable cups can be used for both hot & cold drinks. Our paper tea cups are ideal for serving coffee, hot chocolate, or fruit juice.

Heat-Resistant for Safe Use: No need to worry about scalds or burns with our cardboard cups for hot drinks that boast a heat-resistant surface. Lets you securely hold your hot cup without burning your hand.
Easy-to-Use for Everyone: Unlike paper coffee cups with lids that are hard to use, our lightweight cup can be easily refilled so guests can enjoy. Available in various pack sizes to suit your need.
Staple for Every Occasion: Be it for your shop, office, or home—our coffee cups make serving drinks hassle-free! Click 'Add to Basket' now to stock up on these pantry essentials!
